description: Featuring vans' latest cupsole design, the Wylie shoe is another great offering from the fashion Sports wear brand. For the individual, authentic, sport and fashion lover, it doesn't get better than the Vans Wylie shoe. Upper Rubber, mesh and suede uppers for durability and comfortDouble stitched panelsLace-ups for a snug FitCushioned footbed for all day comfortFabric liningMidsoleEVA midsole for better shock absorptionOutsoleRubber outsole for durability with Vans' Waffle Grip patternShoe careWipe surface with soft, clean cloth or use a brush to remove dustDo not use a drier or store in direct sunlight
